programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 818
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 720
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 730
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip-hop duo Rae Sremmurd joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to celebrate the "Sremmlife," get hurt "Worse Than It Looks" and have somebody "Come Get Her"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some "Pins and Needles," get "Scared Forever,".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy, on a 36 year mission in space, go crazy from boredom. Penniless and hungry, Ren and Stimpy seek work as mice catchers - with Ren as the bait.

programme.desc: Captain Hero attempts to pledge a new neighborhood Greek family, and Ling Ling's dad moves in.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero must become cool in order to save the world, and Toot and Ling-Ling take up cockfighting.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The surviving roommates return home to cast a new roommate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Stimpy becomes overly superstitious. He continues to live by his superstitions and Ren keeps disbelieving. Ren and Stimpy travel to a new country and take the viewer along.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jane and Daria team up for an art contest depicting their idea of student life at the dawn of the millennium, but their negative approach doesn't sit well with everyone.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The students of Lawndale High take a paint-balling field trip, and Daria and Quinn are in for a surprise when their parents sign up as chaperones.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren is suffering from allergies. Little does he know that he may be allergic to his best pal. Ren and Stimpy leave the country when it rains and their fields are ruined with fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy debates her future with Sam after learning the heart-breaking news that Marlo is pregnant with his baby.

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rookie DC Anna Travis investigates seven brutal murders. Clues link all to actor Alan Daniels, charming, famous and seemingly untouchable. Even Travis may not be immune to his allure.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a copycat of the Black Dahlia case. DC Anna Travis follows a trail of chilling clues to a powerful suspect, but can she prove it before he strikes again?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: DI Anna Travis returns, investigating the murder of ex-cop Frank Brandon. As secrets unravel, an autistic witness may hold the key to exposing a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Passed over for promotion, Langton leads the case of star Amanda Delany's murder. A crucifix, silent screams and a second death point to dark secrets in her past, and a killer still close.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Travis joins Alan Daniels on a date and grows more convinced of his innocence, but is it just another performance? And could he still have more of his story to reveal?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 2

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Petrozzo dies from a forced fentanyl OD. Travis links it to a 30M stash stolen in Miami. A diary entry Godot leads her to Julia's ex, who may be a dangerous fugitive using an alias.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Amanda's lovers are questioned, one lost a crucifix, another's wife saw a man at the flat. Her toy rabbit and drugs are missing. Another body turns up, and secrets keep piling up.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Langton learns Wickenham abused both daughters, Emily and Justine, and killed in Black Dahlia style. Evidence from Gail and photos expose him; he dies trapped, likely by the protective housekeeper.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: David Rushton is found dead like Petrozzo fentanyl overdose, CCTV turned to the wall. A shaken Julia is questioned. A blurry CCTV image may reveal the killer, could it be Fitzpatrick?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's day begins with a phone call from a kidnapper who happened to dial the wrong number - his! The kidnapper believes he's called the original victim and demands Dr. Sloan deliver money if he wants to see his son alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 11

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 13

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the final episode of the current series it's a glorious day for an Essex Wedding as Carol and Mark Wright celebrate their 30th anniversary by renewing their wedding vows. Lucy and Mario have a heart-to-heart.

programme.desc: Blaze and AJ visit VelocityVille, a town full of race cars where everybody loves to go fast! But when a snooty car named Speedrick traps all the other racers, Blaze must transform into a super-fast race car to free his new friends.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade. When the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets, Leah calls on her genies for some arcade assistance!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Starla discover a map that leads to a track of legend – the Bouncing Bull Racetrack! The friends set out on a Wild West quest to find the track and take the ride of their lives.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 616
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are playing with their friend Zeg when he accidentally gets blasted by a geyser into a far away mud pit. It’s up to Blaze and AJ to save him, and they must use engineering design inspired by their new dinosaur-truck-friends.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The Umi City Toy Store: Milli, Geo and Bot meet up with their friend Colin at the Umi City Toy Shop. Colin is going to buy a quite extraordinary stuffed toy dog - but then a monkey arrives.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Blaze, Starla, and Darington can’t wait to play every animal’s favorite sport: Jungle Ball! But when their teammate Tooks the Toucan gets launched from the stadium, it’s up to the friends to get her back in the game.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: Geo has a new pet - a seahorse! Coincidentally, there's a problem at the Umi City Aquarium, where there's a big crack in the seahorse tank. Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Samira tells the girls the story of how she and Zeta first met – and how they were once best friends. / The girls must stop Zeta when she takes a scepter that gives her the power to grow magical vines and gems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s Christmas Eve, and Blaze and AJ are helping Santa load his magic bag of presents to deliver all over the world. But Crusher accidently knocks over the bag and sends the presents flying.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher discover a medieval kingdom holding a Royal Race! The two trucks become knights to compete in the race across the realm. But even though Sir Blaze is the speediest knight of all, Crusher's cheats won't make it easy to win.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find a lovable little space creature named Winky. He came to visit with his family, our Purple Planet friends. But, uh oh, he's lost. We have to get Baby Winky back to his family before their spaceship takes off!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a mystery bandit makes off with Blaze's trophy, he'll need to track down the culprit, all while learning about magnets.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Zac uses a wish to bring his dog Rocket to Zahramay Falls – but the genies mistake him for a monster. / After using magic to make Zac forget who he is, Zeta trains him as her apprentice and tries teaching him potions.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Piggy 500, and Starla is excited to race with her prize pig, Zippy, in a team race. But when her competitor Crusher and his rude pig, Slop, cheat and send Zippy far away, it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Starla to find him.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are on Animal Island when they discover a world of tiny creatures right under their tires: Insect City! The friends transform into a super-strong ant and a bouncy grasshopper for their littlest big adventure yet!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to make it to the finish line. Part 2

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: When the magical ladybugs escape from Samira's palace, the girls must get them back before Zeta cause trouble with them. When Zeta loses faith in her sorcery abilities, Shimmer, Shine and Leah help her search for something else she'd be good at.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 94
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally punches himself and gets a black eye in 'Blackened Sponge', while in 'Mermaid Man vs. SpongeBob', Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are brainwashed by Plankton!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 95
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick board a ship of prisoners going to jail in 'The Inmates Of Summer', and then in 'To Save A Squirrel', SpongeBob and Patrick stow away on one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 104
programme.desc: When Squidward points out that SpongeBob is 'Not Normal', he resolves to change his ways. And then in 'Gone', SpongeBob wakes up to discover that everyone in Bikini Bottom is... gone!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 105
programme.desc: SpongeBob is injured at work in 'The Splinter', while in 'Slide Whistle Stooges', SpongeBob and Patrick are driving Squidward crazy with their new slide whistles.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Patrick decides it's time to start living life like Larry the Lobster in 'A Life In A Day', and then in 'Sun Bleached', SpongeBob tries to get a tan, with disappointing results.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Squidward becomes monstrously huge, which only pleases SpongeBob and Patrick, in 'Giant Squidward', and in 'No Nose Knows', Patrick notices that he has no nose. How does he smell? He doesn't. Yet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The Krabby Patty's secret ingredient is stolen and SpongeBob must find it in 'The Patty Caper', and then in 'Plankton's Regular', Plankton is surprised to have a regular customer who enjoys his food.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Squidward gets busted for speeding in his boat (which isn't a speedboat) and is sent back to boating school in 'Boating Buddies'. Then in 'The Krabby Kronicle', Mr Krabs sets up his own newspaper.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is messing up Pearl's preparations in 'The Slumber Party', and then in 'Grooming Gary', SpongeBob gives Gary a makeover, so that he can enter him in a pet show. But Gary's not so keen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 111
programme.desc: SpongeBob And The Big Wave: Our heroes find themselves stranded on a tropical island, inhabited by an enigmatic surfing guru named Jack Kahuna Laguna. Guest starring the voice of Johnny Depp.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 112
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes the richest Sponge in Bikini Bottom in 'Porous Pockets', and in 'Choir Boys', Squidward tries to avoid SpongeBob while on his way to an audition for the Bikini Bottom Men's Chorus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Mr Krabs enters the world of professional wrestling in 'Krusty Krushers', and then in 'The Card', SpongeBob is determined to get a super rare Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy trading card.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 114
programme.desc: SpongeBob is determined to find out everything there is to know about Vikings in 'Dear Vikings', and then in 'Ditchin', Patrick persuades SpongeBob to ditch class, but fun soon turns to guilt.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: After racking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up to pay off their debt in 'Diner Ducks', then in 'Switcheroo', things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jimmy heads a world-leading baseball team, and uses his genius Neutronic technology to improve the equipment. Carl and Sheen convince Jimmy to fast forward to old age, because they want to buy a video game that they are technically too young for.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The gang wishes every day was Halloween-so they decide to make it happen. Sanjay and Craig compete on a road-show version of the classic Nickelodeon series "G.U.T.S." Guest Stars: Mike O'Malley & Moira Quirk

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jimmy takes Carl, Libby, Sheen and Cindy to see some real-life mummies, but when his invention accidentally brings them to life, it could all be over.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig start a prank war with the prank master. Sanjay and Craig disguise themselves to get free wings.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: When SwaySway discovers Jenny Quackles only likes bad boys, he eats Dark Rye and turns evil in 'Bad to the Duck Bone', then in 'Rodeo Ducks', SwaySway and Buhdeuce become rodeo stars.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Danielle Phantom is back! Only this time, she's being hunted by Valerie whose been tricked by Vlad Masters into thinking the ghost girl is evil.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Jimmy, Carl and Sheen fall for a cute girl at the rodeo; Cindy Vortex leads a campaign to ban Jimmy from the school's science fair.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The dudes play the Dicksons in an epic game of Family Double Dare. Craig gets possessed by an evil pizza demon that wants to destroy the Frycade.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 220
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce take to the Great Pond for an epic quest in 'Great White Shark Bread', then in 'Freaky Finger Bread', SwaySway must pretend he likes Buhdeuce's unusual birthday present.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. // Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Sanjay is star-struck when he meets his favorite movie villain - until he discovers the actor is not so different from his devious onscreen personae. Sanjay and Craig discover a way to hypnotize Darlene and Vijay.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The Yolkians have come to earth, but this time they seek out only peace and brotherhood with the people of Retroville. While Jimmy Neutron suspects the worst, everyone in town is ready to forgive and forget.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Noodman tries to uncover Sanjay and Craig’s racket of keeping money for newspapers they don’t deliver. Sanjay and Craig take an orphaned baby bird under their wings.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 223
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library but Lola refuses to participate // When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Craig is unable to speak, Sanjay and Megan must travel inside him to find his Voice. Sanjay and Craig are thrilled The Dicksons invite them for a sleepover, but the family's oddities become more than they can handle.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce help their rock idol get his career back on track in 'Rock 'N' Roar', and then in 'Wolf Head Bread', SwaySway and Buhdeuce seek out the rarest bread in all the Bread Mines.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: SwaySway must overcome his stage fright to perform a love song for Jenny in 'Pondgea's Got Talent', and then in 'Raging Mole', SwaySway and Buhdeuce convince the Bread Maker to lose a wrestling match.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The dudes celebrate their "friend-iversary" at a Frycade sleepover event, but the night doesn't go as Sanjay plans. Vijay showcases a reprogramed Partybot at a local tech expo.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Buhdeuce makes a dangerous wish for his own chest hair in 'Chest Hair Club', and then in 'Bros Night Out', SwaySway and Buhdeuce take T-Midi on a quazy "bro's night out".

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: The rocket van is about to get some sweet mods from ace-mechanic and friend, Ketta in 'Rocket Trouble', and then in 'The Brave and the Mould', mould strikes the bread mines!

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: When Jelly gets mistaken for a princess, the guys must rescue her from Oonski The Great in 'The Princess Frog Bride', and in 'Super Duck vs Muscle Bread', SwaySway and Buhdeuce become superhero ducks.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a "regular and normal" boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The kids build a homemade raft to rescue mysterious castaways. The Dicksons are seduced by fame and fortune and Sanjay and Craig are to blame.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 221
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. // Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Anti-Poof: For every fairy, there’s an anti-fairy – thus anti-Poof is born – FOOP! It’s up to Poof to stop this anti-fairy from destroying Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Scary GodCouple: Foop becomes Vicky’s anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Hall Monitor/Harold's Bar Mitzvah: When it's time for Helga to step down as Hall Monitor, Helga chooses Phoebe as her replacement. Helga assumes that Phoebe will let Helga maintain the extra perks which come with the assignment.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Bored Identity/Country Clubbed: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad’s life was like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Rain keeps Reggie from training for the Triathlon, so she joins in some kitchen-destroying mayhem with Otto. Tired of Reggie's bossy attitude, Twister and Otto make fun of her when she wipes out.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mission: Responsible/Hair-i-cane: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted from taking care of their baby, so Timmy volunteers to take over and give them a night out on the town./Timmy wishes up indestructible hair with personality that can never be cut!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Steely Phil/Quantity Time: Arnold trains Grandpa to take on his old Chinese checkers nemesis, Robby Fisher. Miriam decides to visit her mother after learning that Big Bob and Helga are on vacation at the same time.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Arnold becomes a hot (and dangerous) hitter. He keeps injuring people every time he swings the bat. Afraid of hurting more people, Arnold refuses to play ball. / Arnold and Gerald manage the career of the unlikely country-and-western singer, Mr. Hyunh.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: King Chang/The End of the Universe-ity: Shya! Mark Chang is called back to Yugopotamia to become king while his father, under attack from a mystery assailant, flees for his life. Dark Laser’s back and tries to make Timmy his apprentice!

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Counting on the natural beaver reflex to dam running water, the government air-drops Norb and Dag into a flood zone.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him altogether.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A monster storm washes the Beavers out of their dam and strands them in a scary Dixieland bayou.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Terrible Twosome/App Trap: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof’s terrible twos.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A record heatwave strikes the city, setting everyone on edge./Arnold wakes to find the city covered in snow and hears that school is closed for the day.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Operation: Ruthless/The Vacant Lot: Arnold decides to get up the nerve to speak with the girl of his dreams, Ruth McDougal, at the annual cheese festival./Arnold and the gang clean up a vacant lot so that they can have a baseball field.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Meet the Odd Parents: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won’t take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: While on their way to a sports coliseum, Daggett annoys the bus driver who accidentally drives the bus through a hole in the fabric of space and time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dinklescouts/I Dream of Cosmo: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy’s respect and his leader position. Cosmo has amnesia and thinks he’s Dad’s genie.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Helga tries to hide her disappointment at not being invited to Rhonda's makeover party. She gives herself her own makeover and crashes the party with the neighborhood boys in tow, trying to out girlie-girl everyone else at the party.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. The only problem is, she accidentally goes to the wrong French restaurant.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Helga has been secretly building a shrine in her closet to Arnold. She has been collecting his combs, old school photos, used band-aids and chewing gum, but only one thing will make the shrine complete: Arnold's hat.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When it looks like Otto will make the cover of Gnarly Surf Magazine, Reggie is angry because the photographer doesn't think girls can surf.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh find out Megan have adopted a pet sheep, they want nothing to do with it.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Big Time Rush has just dropped their second album and the guys get interviewed on an entertainment tonight-type program where they answer revealing questions about their life inside and outside of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Babe is upset to learn that Mason Kendal is moving, so Kenzie designs her a virtual reality version of Mason. Babe loves it, but gets a little too swept up in the experience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Kenzie is hypnotized into being very, very hungry after the Game Shakers take her to see a hypnotist for her birthday.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 316
programme.desc: Dub recommends Kenzie see an eccentric pet plastic surgeon in order to fix her cat's loud nose holes. Meanwhile, Trip tries to get Hudson into a Boy Band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The Palm Woods school is having it's annual Prom and Carlos, James, Logan and Kendall are all determined to win the prom king title, doing whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the guys prepare for their first band photo, which could land them into all the teen magazines.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's been three months since the boys of Big Time Rush moved to Hollywood to record their demos. Now its now up to Griffin to decides the future of the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: In an attempt to seal a promotional partnership with Clam Jumper, the Game Shakers try to hack a billboard and live-stream their new game.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake and Josh compete in a contest where a new Plasma Screen TV is the grand prize but refuse to include Megan who turns out to to be their toughest competition.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Babe tries to plan the perfect date when she finds out that Henry Hart is coming to New York to visit her.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After meeting Susan, Drake's new girlfriend, Josh becomes convinced that her flirtation is more than friendly behavior.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo help Carlos find a date, and Logan flirts with a new girl while still confused about his feelings for Camille. James wants to help Katie get closer to her new crush, but becomes like an overprotective father.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Tiny Pickles: Babe and Kenzie's new game is ready, but Dub promises the world another game based on a crazy dream he had. The kids make his game and it's terrible. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 18
